title: Universe requiem
description: Private SMP, Welcome to use with your friends.
body:
Hello there, Small private modpack for freindos.
If DrkShdX or LYR1EX3 gave you the link, this is likely the modpack your looking for.

Main mods-
Create
Essential
Physics
Friends&Foes
Player Ex
& a few others!

Tested with 6Gb of ram, might be able to get away with 4 or 5 Gb
